svg.title: Drone OS Architecture: Rust Embedded + Python AI/ML
svg.desc: Layered architecture of a drone operating system combining Rust for real-time embedded control and Python for AI/ML mission intelligence

g.text: IMU · GPS · ESCs · LiDAR · Barometer · Radio transceiver · Camera
Rust real-time core — no_std · RTIC · Embassy
Hard real-time, deterministic, memory-safe — runs on bare metal MCU

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a drone flight controller work with RTIC in Rust?')
sendPrompt('How does sensor fusion work in an embedded Rust drone?')
sendPrompt('How does PWM motor control work for a drone in Rust embedded?')
sendPrompt('What is MAVLink and how is it used in drone communication?')

g.text: IPC bridge — shared memory · lock-free ring buffer · CAN bus
Rust ↔ Python boundary · serialised with serde + postcard (no allocator on MCU side)
Priority-queued channel: real-time commands pre-empt mission waypoints
Python AI/ML companion — Raspberry Pi 5 · Jetson Orin
High-level intelligence layer · PyTorch · ONNX Runtime · DroneKit · ROS 2 bridge

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does computer vision work for drone obstacle avoidance?')
sendPrompt('How does path planning work for autonomous drone navigation?')
sendPrompt('How does reinforcement learning help drones learn to fly better?')
sendPrompt('What is DroneKit and how does it interact with PX4?')

g.text: Ground station & cloud — mission planning · training · fleet ops
Telemetry dashboards · model training pipeline · OTA firmware · SITL simulation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is PX4 SITL simulation and how do you use it for drone development?')
sendPrompt('How do you train AI models for drone perception and deploy them on edge hardware?')
sendPrompt('How does OTA firmware update work for embedded Rust on a drone?')
sendPrompt('What telemetry and monitoring tools are used in drone fleet management?')
